_comment: Merge these entries into the mcpServers block of ~/.claude.json (or use `claude mcp add`). Paths assume the locations created by install.sh; install.sh writes a resolved copy to setup/mcp.servers.resolved.json (HOME + email substituted). 'asta' is Ai2's official Semantic Scholar MCP (Asta Scientific Corpus Tool) — REMOTE, nothing to install, and it works WITHOUT a key (rate-limited). For higher rate limits, request a free key at https://allenai.org/asta/resources/mcp and add a header to the asta entry: "headers": { "x-api-key": "YOUR_ASTA_KEY" } (paste the literal key — Claude Code does not expand ${ENV} placeholders here, so a placeholder would be sent verbatim and rejected with HTTP 403). Asta use is subject to Ai2's License Agreement (https://allenai.org/asta-corpus-license) + Terms of Use (https://allenai.org/terms); Semantic Scholar data is ODC-BY (attribute Semantic Scholar, do not redistribute the raw data).
